title: Sakala Kalasala
overview: Akbar studies in an engineering college and is a brilliant student. He makes everyone proud when he wins the first prize in a tech fest. However, things take a turn when one of his technical innovation backfires and leaves him into serious trouble. Will Akbar be able to overcome this problem?
